title: Integrations
subtitle: Connect email, calendar, and meeting services

categoryDesc.email: Connect email accounts to read, send, search, and organize messages
categoryDesc.calendar: Connect calendars to create events, check availability, and manage schedules
categoryDesc.meeting: Connect meeting platforms to schedule calls and retrieve join links

gmail.name: Gmail
gmail.description: Read, send, search, and organize email via Gmail API

outlook_mail.name: Outlook
outlook_mail.description: Read, send, search, and organize email via Microsoft Graph

google_calendar.name: Google Calendar
google_calendar.description: Create, update, and manage calendar events via Google Calendar API

outlook_calendar.name: Outlook Calendar
outlook_calendar.description: Create, update, and manage calendar events via Microsoft Graph

zoom.name: Zoom
zoom.description: Schedule meetings and retrieve join links via Zoom API

google_meet.name: Google Meet
google_meet.description: Schedule meetings with Google Meet links via Calendar API

ms_teams_meetings.name: Microsoft Teams
ms_teams_meetings.description: Schedule Teams meetings and retrieve join links via Microsoft Graph

disconnectDescription: This will revoke access and remove stored tokens. You can reconnect later.
oauthHintBody: Integrations use OAuth2 for secure access. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID, MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET, and ZOOM_CLIENT_ID, ZOOM_CLIENT_SECRET in your environment to enable connections.
